subject: [PATCH 09/11] mm/vmstat, memcontrol: Track ZSWAP_B, ZSWAPPED_B per-memcg-lruvec

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the accuracy of NR_ZSWAPPED_B and suggested that it may not be possible to fix this without invasive changes across all vmstat infrastructure. Noted that handling of objcg migrations is handled in a subsequent patch.

2026-03-11.patch_summary: This patch series refactors the tracking of zswap statistics to improve accuracy and handling of compressed objects spanning multiple nodes. It moves MEMCG_ZSWAP_B and MEMCG_ZSWAPPED_B from enum memcg_stat_item to node_stat_item, decouples updates of node stats and memcg-lruvec stats, and introduces a new function mod_memcg_lruvec_state() to update memcg-lruvec stats precisely.
